query:
-- Compare both customers
SELECT externalId, name, businessName, customerType, siteAddress, contactName, contactEmail, contactPhone
FROM customers WHERE externalId IN ('C0249', 'C2753');

-- Check what services each has
SELECT customerExternalId, COUNT(*) as serviceCount, GROUP_CONCAT(planName SEPARATOR ' | ') as services
FROM services WHERE customerExternalId IN ('C0249', 'C2753')
GROUP BY customerExternalId;

-- Check what billing items each has
SELECT customerExternalId, COUNT(*) as billingItemCount, SUM(lineAmount) as totalRevenue
FROM billing_items WHERE customerExternalId IN ('C0249', 'C2753')
GROUP BY customerExternalId;
